---
id: create-subname
title: "Create a subname"
description: "Creates a subname under the resolved namespace. In Safe mode this returns a proposed Safe transaction; in direct mode this returns a confirmed transaction hash."
sidebar_label: "Create a subname"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api//enscribe-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create a subname"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v2/orgs/{orgId}/subnames"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a subname under the resolved namespace. In Safe mode this returns a proposed Safe transaction; in direct mode this returns a confirmed transaction hash.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
